metadata.title: Ronan Ramos Sibunga • Senior Software Engineer & Distributed Systems Architect
metadata.description: Senior Software Engineer specializing in distributed systems, AI orchestration pipelines, React Native ecosystems, NestJS backend engineering, Dockerized infrastructure, workflow automation, and end-to-end product architecture.
metadata.author: Ronan Ramos Sibunga
metadata.status: Building scalable systems for modern businesses.

personal.name: Ronan Ramos Sibunga
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer & Distributed Systems Architect
personal.subtitle: AI Orchestration • Distributed Systems • React Native • NestJS • Docker • Automation
personal.location: San Jose Del Monte, Bulacan, Philippines
personal.summary: Senior Software Engineer focused on end-to-end product engineering, distributed backend systems, AI orchestration pipelines, cloud-native infrastructure, and scalable mobile ecosystems. Experienced in architecting production-grade applications using React Native, NestJS, Node.js, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, and modern automation workflows.

contact.address: Ciudad Real Subdivision, City of San Jose Del Monte, Bulacan

competencies.title: End-to-End Product Engineering
competencies.description: Designing and delivering complete production systems across frontend, backend, infrastructure, automation, and deployment pipelines.

competencies.title: Distributed Systems & Backend Architecture
competencies.description: Building scalable backend services, event-driven workflows, microservices, and resilient APIs using NestJS, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Docker.

competencies.title: AI Orchestration & Intelligent Automation
competencies.description: Developing LLM-integrated systems, agent workflows, orchestration pipelines, embeddings, and automation tooling for modern operational environments.

competencies.title: React Native Mobile Ecosystems
competencies.description: Engineering cross-platform mobile systems with scalable architecture, offline-first capabilities, and production deployment strategies.

competencies.title: Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
competencies.description: Containerized deployments, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, and environment orchestration using Docker and modern DevOps workflows.

experience.desc: Architecting distributed web and mobile platforms with React Native, NestJS, Node.js, Docker, PostgreSQL, and AI-powered automation pipelines.
Led frontend and backend engineering initiatives, scalable React ecosystems, workflow optimization, and enterprise-grade system delivery.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
